zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord Henry de Pierrepont於1231年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾霍爾貝可時，他的父親Lord Robert de Pierrepont38歲，母親Maud25歲。他於大約1251年與Annora Manvers在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾霍爾梅 皮朋特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1299年在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾霍爾梅 皮朋特享年68歲。

nameMeanings.name: Pierrepont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord Henry de Pierrepont was born in 1231, in Holbeck, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Lord Robert de Pierrepont, was 38 and his mother, Maud, was 25. He married Annora Manvers about 1251, in Holme Pierrepont, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1299, in Holme Pierrepont, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord Henry de Pierrepont est né en 1231, à Holbeck, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Lord Robert de Pierrepont, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Maud, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Annora Manvers environ 1251, à Holme Pierrepont, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1299, à Holme Pierrepont, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord Henry de Pierrepont 1231 in Holbeck, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Robert de Pierrepont 38 und seine Mutter Maud 25. Er hat um 1251 in Holme Pierrepont, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Annora Manvers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1299 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Holme Pierrepont, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord Henry de Pierrepontが1231年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアホールベックで生まれた時，父Lord Robert de Pierrepontは38歳，母Maudは25歳であった。約1251年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアホールメ ピエレプオントでAnnora Manversと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1299年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアホールメ ピエレプオントで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord Henry de Pierrepont(이)가 1231년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 홀벡에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Robert de Pierrepont(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1251년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 홀 피레프트에서 Annora Manvers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1299년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 홀 피레프트에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Henry de Pierrepont nasceu em 1231, em Holbeck, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Lord Robert de Pierrepont, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Maud, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Annora Manvers aproximadamente 1251, em Holme Pierrepont, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1299, em Holme Pierrepont, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord Henry de Pierrepont родился в 1231 г. в местности холбекк, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Lord Robert de Pierrepont было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Annora Manvers около 1251 г. в местности холм пьиррепонт, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1299 г. в местности холм пьиррепонт, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 68 лет.

Se casó con Annora Manvers aproximadamente 1251, en Holme Pierrepont, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija.
